mnemonics.title: Five Pillars of IoT Management
mnemonics.content: SRDSL - Scale, Remote ops, Data insights, Security, Lifecycle. Remember: 'Sensors Require Diligent Systematic Leadership'.

mnemonics.title: Device Lifecycle Stages
mnemonics.content: P.O.D - Provisioning, Operation, Decommissioning. Every device goes through these three stages: born (provisioned), lives (operates), retires (decommissioned).

mnemonics.title: Security Management Actions
mnemonics.content: CAMP - Credentials (authentication), Anomaly detection, Monitoring (continuous), Patching (rapid FOTA). The four security actions of IoT management.

mnemonics.title: Why Management is Non-Negotiable
mnemonics.content: PHD level work: Provisioning, Health monitoring, Diagnostics. Without these three capabilities, no IoT system can operate reliably at scale.
